reviews.review_title: A Stumbling in the Dark Simulation
reviews.review_description:
The games look and design seemed possibly interesting from what very little I could see and read about it before purchasing, so I figured it'd be worth a try at the cbeap price.
From what I have played, it's not seeming worth even the small price tag, because the puzzle elements seem relegated to aimlessly stumbling around in the dark until you are lucky enough to not be bumping into a wall. So more aimless luck than anything resembling true brain teasers... 
This isn't something that can carry an entire game, as cool as the effects can look when they actually stay in place around you enough to actually make out images. Otherwise, just be ready to.be staring at a black void and walking around like a blind toddler just trying to get around...
Take the game as it's titled and only buy if you really love darkness, because it's basically nothing but a walking in pitch black simulator with some nice effects as you touch things trying to get around...
Not worth it for me personally, and I'm too broke to risk keepng it to see if it evolves into anything worthehile..

developer_response.body:
Hi. Thank you so much for your feedback. It's a pity that you didn't like it very much. I want to give you a key for the Steam version, due to the greater power of the PC, it supports a much larger number of particles. And the process of visualizing the environment is accelerated.
VI8JI-DX3CE-KDCYT

reviews.review_description:
What a strange but amazing experience. Every puzzle here is unique and well-thought out. Every phase of the game is different. The progression is rewarding and the immersion is second to none.

I'm pretty sure I've finished the game, but I'm not positive. I think I'll sit here for a bit and muse over what just happened.

If you want something innovative and special, get Sense of Darkness.

developer_response.body: Hi. Thank you so much for your positive feedback. In a room with water, you need to catch a floating boat and launch it into a niche with water. He will press a secret button that will open the door and pull out a ramp to enter it. If something suddenly went wrong, you need to restart the game with the Continue menu option.

reviews.review_description: The darkness aspect adds a lot to the experience. It's scary at times. I'm currently stuck at a green "door", not sure how to get past. A YouTuber's playthrough got a "Push with Body" text, but I didn't see that. 🤷‍♂️

developer_response.body: Hi. Thank you so much for your positive feedback. Sorry for the lack of a clue in front of the green door, this is a really difficult moment..

reviews.review_description: This game is unlike anything I've seen before.  Very fun, and very unexpected. I wish I could write a review to make everyone give it a try.  I loved it!

developer_response.body: Hi. Thank you so much for your positive feedback.

reviews.review_description:
this is really a  Immersive VR Experience the opposite of AR what some people like. i like VR more to escape from my world sometimes

i had also my new headsstrap with speakers waaaaw great to feel it in the dark.
only i do not know if i have the end i think lets say i did not find the lightswitch but using this will ban the darkness ;-))

a low version number could only mean here there will be added more ??

Great you like it but i dont have a power pc so i dont have steam i just use the quest standalone and i like it just because its made with a limited particle's you are using the only think was i wanted to play it on the quest PRO because the local dimmingg zones it should be really dark and not gray. but not supported on the pro ;-((

and you posted the key in a the public answer on my review so ? the first who copy it will activate it to ? ;-))
